basic_details.job_title: BITS Pilani Ph.D. Position Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Birla Institute of Technology and Science, Pilani (BITS Pilani)
basic_details.short_information: Birla Institute of Technology and Science, Pilani (BITS Pilani) Ph.D. Position Notification 2026 has been released on 02 March 2026 on the official website of BITS Pilani. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the BITS Pilani Ph.D. Position Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Tech. / M.E. / B.E. / B.Tech. in Chemical Engineering/ Environmental Engineering/ Energy Engineering or other allied disciplines from a recognized university, with minimum 60% aggregate marks or equivalent CGPA.
qualification.details: M.Tech. / M.E. / B.E. / B.Tech. in Chemical Engineering/ Environmental Engineering/ Energy Engineering or other allied disciplines from a recognized university, with minimum 60% aggregate marks or equivalent CGPA.

salary_details.details: Rs. 37,000 + 30% HRA = Rs. 48100 per month Annual Contingency: Rs. 20,000/-

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 25-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: BITS Pilani Ph.D. Position Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the BITS Pilani Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download BITS Pilani Ph.D. Position Job 2026 Notification PDF

BITS Pilani Ph.D. Position Salary 2026
content_sections.text: Rs. 37,000 + 30% HRA = Rs. 48100 per month Annual Contingency: Rs. 20,000/-

content_sections.heading: BITS Pilani Ph.D. Position Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
BITS Pilani Ph.D. Position Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 25-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: BITS Pilani Ph.D. Position Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the BITS Pilani Ph.D. Position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the BITS Pilani Ph.D. Position is 25th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for this Ph.D. position?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.Tech./M.E./B.E./B.Tech. degree in Chemical Engineering, Environmental Engineering, Energy Engineering, or allied disciplines from a recognized university with at least 60% aggregate marks.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for the BITS Pilani Ph.D. Position recruitment. Both General/OBC and SC/ST categories are exempt from paying any application fee.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Ph.D. Position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Ph.D. Position is 28 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Ph.D. Position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary ranging from Rs. 37,000 to Rs. 48,100 per month, which includes HRA. Additionally, an annual contingency of Rs. 20,000 is provided.

faq.question: Q6. How will the candidates be selected for the Ph.D. Position?
faq.answer: The selection process for the BITS Pilani Ph.D. Position involves an Online Interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and performance in the interview.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this Ph.D. Position?
faq.answer: The Ph.D. Position at BITS Pilani is a contractual role. This means the appointment will be for a fixed tenure as per the terms and conditions of the institute.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the BITS Pilani campus located for this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is for the BITS Pilani campus located in Hyderabad, Telangana.

faq.question: Q9. Can I apply offline for this position?
faq.answer: No, the application mode for this Ph.D. Position is strictly via Email. Offline applications will not be considered.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the "Important Links" section of this article. It is highly recommended to read the official notification thoroughly before applying.
